poc: Logged in with admin/admin to admin console. Full application access obtained.
remediation: Change all default credentials immediately. Implement password policy.

poc: Services communicate over HTTP on internal network. Captured cleartext transaction data via ARP spoofing.
remediation: Implement mutual TLS (mTLS) for all inter-service communication.

finding_title: Verbose Error Messages Expose Stack Traces
poc: Java stack trace exposed in error response revealing internal class names, database structure.
remediation: Implement generic error messages for production. Log detailed errors server-side only.
